requirement_topic.en: EMC and Electrical Disturbance Evidence for Industrial Motors
requirement_topic.zh: 工业电机 EMC 与电气扰动依据
requirement_topic.zht: 工業電機 EMC 與電氣擾動依據

summary.en: Standalone industrial AC motors may be reviewed mainly through electrical safety, performance and BDS motor standards, while motor-driven systems, variable-speed drives and control panels can raise EMC or power-quality questions. Bangladesh importers should prepare evidence for conducted emissions, immunity, harmonics or installation controls where the motor package includes electronic drives.
summary.zh: 独立工业交流电机可能主要按电气安全、性能和 BDS 电机标准审查，而含电机驱动系统、变频器和控制柜的组合可能产生 EMC 或电能质量问题。若电机套装包含电子驱动，孟加拉国进口商应准备传导发射、抗扰度、谐波或安装控制依据。
summary.zht: 獨立工業交流電機可能主要按電氣安全、性能和 BDS 電機標準審查，而含電機驅動系統、變頻器和控制櫃的組合可能產生 EMC 或電能品質問題。若電機套裝包含電子驅動，孟加拉國進口商應準備傳導發射、抗擾度、諧波或安裝控制依據。

standards_or_laws: Applicable BDS or IEC 60034 motor standards
BERC grid and power-quality oversight context
Relevant IEC EMC standards where electronic drives are included

summary.en: China motor evidence normally centers on GB 18613, GB 12665 and CCC for low-voltage motors in scope. If the export package includes drives or controllers, Chinese EMC reports may exist under GB or IEC-based EMC standards, but they must be mapped to the Bangladesh configuration.
summary.zh: 中国电机依据通常以 GB 18613、GB 12665 及适用低压电机的 CCC 为核心。若出口套装包含驱动器或控制器，可能存在中国 GB 或 IEC 基础 EMC 报告，但必须映射至孟加拉国配置。
summary.zht: 中國電機依據通常以 GB 18613、GB 12665 及適用低壓電機的 CCC 為核心。若出口套裝包含驅動器或控制器，可能存在中國 GB 或 IEC 基礎 EMC 報告，但必須映射至孟加拉國配置。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: A bare motor file may not cover the exported system if a VFD, soft starter or control cabinet is bundled. Bangladesh review should be based on the full delivered configuration, not only the China motor certificate.
gap.zh: 若捆绑变频器、软启动器或控制柜，仅裸电机文件可能无法覆盖出口系统。孟加拉国审查应基于完整交付配置，而不仅是中国电机证书。
gap.zht: 若捆綁變頻器、軟啟動器或控制櫃，僅裸電機文件可能無法覆蓋出口系統。孟加拉國審查應基於完整交付配置，而不僅是中國電機證書。

mandatory_status.target: Case-dependent; mandatory where BDS, import review, grid connection or bundled electronics requirements apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where China CCC, GB or EMC requirements apply to the product configuration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Check EMC and power-quality evidence at system level if the motor is supplied with a drive or controller. China motor-only certificates may be too narrow.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 如电机随驱动器或控制器供应，应按系统层面核查 EMC 和电能质量依据。仅有中国电机证书可能范围过窄。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 如電機隨驅動器或控制器供應，應按系統層面核查 EMC 和電能品質依據。僅有中國電機證書可能範圍過窄。

requirement_topic.en: BTRC Radio or Wireless Functions in Motor Packages
requirement_topic.zh: 电机套装中的 BTRC 无线电或无线功能
requirement_topic.zht: 電機套裝中的 BTRC 無線電或無線功能

summary.en: If the motor package includes wireless monitoring, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, cellular telemetry, remote control or radio modules, Bangladesh Telecommunications Regulatory Commission requirements can apply separately from BSTI motor certification. Radio equipment approval should be checked for each embedded or supplied wireless module.
summary.zh: 若电机套装包含无线监测、蓝牙、Wi-Fi、蜂窝遥测、远程控制或无线电模块，孟加拉国电信监管委员会要求可能独立于 BSTI 电机认证适用。每个嵌入或随附无线模块均应核查无线电设备批准。
summary.zht: 若電機套裝包含無線監測、藍牙、Wi-Fi、蜂窩遙測、遠程控制或無線電模組，孟加拉國電信監管委員會要求可能獨立於 BSTI 電機認證適用。每個嵌入或隨附無線模組均應核查無線電設備批准。

standards_or_laws: BTRC radio and telecommunications equipment approval requirements
BSTI certification where the motor product is covered
Applicable import documentation for radio-enabled equipment

summary.en: China motor compliance evidence under GB 18613, GB 12665 and CCC does not address Bangladesh radio approval. China SRRC or other wireless approvals for a module, if present, are separate China-market evidence and are not Bangladesh BTRC approvals.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 18613、GB 12665 和 CCC 电机合规依据不覆盖孟加拉国无线电批准。模块如持有中国 SRRC 或其他无线批准，也属于中国市场专项依据，不是孟加拉国 BTRC 批准。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 18613、GB 12665 和 CCC 電機合規依據不覆蓋孟加拉國無線電批准。模組如持有中國 SRRC 或其他無線批准，也屬於中國市場專項依據，不是孟加拉國 BTRC 批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: Wireless functions create a separate approval track. A compliant industrial motor can still be delayed if the telemetry or remote-control module lacks Bangladesh radio documentation.
gap.zh: 无线功能会产生单独批准路径。即使工业电机本身合规，若遥测或远程控制模块缺少孟加拉国无线电文件，仍可能延误。
gap.zht: 無線功能會產生單獨批准路徑。即使工業電機本身合規，若遙測或遠程控制模組缺少孟加拉國無線電文件，仍可能延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where radio or wireless equipment is included
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only for applicable China radio or CCC scope; not transferable to Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Separate the motor approval file from any wireless module approval file. BTRC review may be needed even when BSTI motor certification is otherwise complete.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将电机批准文件与无线模块批准文件分开处理。即使 BSTI 电机认证已完成，仍可能需要 BTRC 审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將電機批准文件與無線模組批准文件分開處理。即使 BSTI 電機認證已完成，仍可能需要 BTRC 審查。
